evidence: The paper trains random forest models (I1_RF, I2_RF, I3_RF) with R Ranger but reports only performance metrics (Q2, RMSE, correlation) via cross-validation without extracting or interpreting feature importance. Feature interpretation comes exclusively from the Com_Epi epistasis model: "From Com_Epi, we extracted per-mutation effects to identify RBD sites" and region interactions. Conclusions rely on prospective experimental validation of model predictions, not importance magnitude/ranking.
